---
title: "Computing for the Social Sciences"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: cosmo
---

### Course Assignments Summer 2026

<div class="my-4"></div>

Assessment for this course consists of four take-home assignments (plus an optional one, see Syllabus for details), four quizzes, in-class participation, and oral code checks:

- **Quizzes** will be posted on Canvas 
- **Take-home assignments** will be posted on this page once they are released 
- **In-class participation** activities will be completed during class, with an asynchronous option available within 24 hours of the start of class
- **Oral code checks** will be scheduled during the course (more info including the sign-up process and rubric, will be shared ahead of time)

<!--
- [Homework 1](hw01.qmd)
- [Homework 2](hw02.qmd)
- [Homework 3](hw03.qmd)
- [Homework 4](hw04.qmd)
- [Homework 5](hw05.qmd)
-->

**Further info:**

- Check our [Course Schedule](../lectures/index.qmd) for and Canvas due dates of all assignments.

- Refer to the [Syllabus](../syllabus.qmd) for assessment policies, including guidelines on late or missing submissions, grading rubric, AI policies, and more.
